name: Menu
description: Menus show a temporary list of choices on a surface — overflow actions behind a ⋮ button, row actions in a data grid, or a list of options from a control. They appear on demand and dismiss on selection or outside click. Built from @mui/material/Menu (a positioned Popover + MenuList) composed with MenuItem children.
keyRule: Use a menu for secondary or overflow actions. Don't hide a view's primary action in a menu — promote it to a button in the toolbar.

variants.name: Overflow menu
variants.whenToUse: Secondary actions behind a ⋮ in toolbars, cards, and DataGrid rows — a usage pattern, not a Menu prop.

variants.name: Dropdown (exposed) menu
variants.whenToUse: A field that opens a list to choose one value (see also Select on the Text fields page) — also a usage pattern, built by anchoring a Menu to a button/input.

variants.name: Context menu
variants.whenToUse: Right-click actions on a desktop row or item — anchor the Menu to the click position via anchorPosition/anchorReference on the underlying Popover.

variants.name: Cascading submenu
variants.whenToUse: Grouped choices that expand to a second level (use sparingly) — composed manually with a nested Menu, not a built-in feature.

anatomy.name: Trigger
anatomy.description: the control that opens the menu (overflow ⋮, a button, or a field) — not part of Menu itself; you control `open` and `anchorEl`.

anatomy.name: Paper (surface)
anatomy.description: an elevated container holding the items — MUI's real `paper` slot.

anatomy.name: MenuItem
anatomy.description: a separate @mui/material component — one choice; may carry a leading icon and a trailing shortcut/meta as its own children.

anatomy.name: Divider
anatomy.description: a separate @mui/material component that groups items (e.g. separates destructive actions).

behaviors.name: Open & dismiss
behaviors.description: Opens anchored to `anchorEl`; closes on selection (call your own onClose from the MenuItem's onClick), Escape, or an outside click (onClose fires with reason 'backdropClick'/'tabKeyDown'/'escapeKeyDown').

behaviors.name: Selection
behaviors.description: Selecting a MenuItem performs the action and should call onClose; use `variant="selectedMenu"` (the real default) so a stateful menu focuses the current choice on open.

behaviors.name: Keyboard
behaviors.description: Arrow keys move focus, Enter activates, Escape closes; typing jumps to a matching item — all built into the underlying MenuList.

states.treatment: Default text on the Paper surface.
Light primary tint / check — pass `selected` to MenuItem.
38% text opacity, not selectable — pass `disabled` to MenuItem.

specs.value: 4px (semantic.radius.default); Paper elevation is MUI's real Popover default (elevation 8), not overridden in theme.ts
MenuItem's real default minHeight is 48px (36px when `dense`)
Themed to 1rem / 16px via theme.ts's MuiMenuItem override — not the app-wide 14px body2 default
Grows to content by default; set minWidth via sx on the paper slot if a fixed minimum is wanted

props.name: open
props.description: Whether the menu surface is open.

props.name: anchorEl
props.description: The element the menu is positioned against — typically the trigger button/field.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called on selection handling you wire up yourself, Escape, an outside click, or Tab-away.

props.name: children
props.description: MenuItem elements — there is no `items` array prop.

props.name: variant
props.description: Real MUI prop (different meaning from a trigger-pattern label): 'selectedMenu' (default) focuses the currently selected item on open; 'menu' always focuses the first item, avoiding selected-item focus jumps.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Focuses the menu list (or its active item) on open. Default true.

props.name: disableAutoFocusItem
props.description: Focuses the menu container instead of an item on open. Default false; has accessibility implications if set.

props.name: transitionDuration
props.description: Length of the open/close transition. Default 'auto'.

props.name: sx
props.description: Standard MUI system prop for one-off style overrides.

doThis: Group destructive actions and set them apart with a Divider.
Keep MenuItem labels short and verb-first.
Use a menu for overflow, not for a view's primary action.
dontDoThis: Don't bury frequently-used actions in an overflow menu.
Don't nest more than one submenu level.
Don't use a menu where a few options fit better as visible buttons or Tabs.
accessibility: Wire the trigger's aria-haspopup and aria-expanded yourself, matching `open` — Menu doesn't set these on your trigger for you.
The Menu surface uses MUI's built-in menu role with menuitem children (MenuItem).
Focus moves into the menu on open (autoFocus/disableAutoFocusItem control exactly where) and returns to the trigger on close via the underlying Modal.
Full keyboard support (arrows, Enter, Escape, type-ahead) comes from the underlying MenuList for free.

related.name: Dialog
related.why: Choices with consequences that need confirmation
